 DIST.AR_TRX_KEY
 ,DIST.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 ,DIST.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY

 ,(CAST ( COALESCE(DIST.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_FUNC_CREDIT_AMT,0.000000) * SLS.SLS_COMM_PCT *    GDCR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE    AS DECIMAL(26,7)))  RU_AR_TRX_LINE_USD_CREDIT_AMT
 ,(CAST(COALESCE(DIST.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_FUNC_DEBIT_AMT ,0.000000) * SLS.SLS_COMM_PCT *     GDCR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE   AS DECIMAL(26,7)))  RU_AR_TRX_LINE_USD_DEBIT_AMT
 ,CASE WHEN NROL.PRODUCT_KEY>0 THEN NROL.PRODUCT_KEY
 ELSE (CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN SUBSTR(DIST.REV_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,1,2) ='41' THEN 'Y'
 WHEN SUBSTR(DIST.REV_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,1,2) ='42' THEN 'Y'
 WHEN SUBSTR(DIST.REV_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,1,3)='433' THEN 'Y'
 ELSE 'N'
 END) ='Y' THEN 5728617 ELSE 5863624 END) END
 ,DIST.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
 ,DIST.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE
 ,DIST.SS_CODE
 ,SLS.SALES_ORDER_KEY
 ,SLS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 ,SLS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 ,SLS.SLS_COMM_PCT
 ,DIST.GL_POSTED_DT
 ,CASE  WHEN SUBSTR(DIST.REV_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,1,2) ='41' THEN 'Y'
 WHEN SUBSTR(DIST.REV_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,1,2) ='42' THEN 'Y'
 WHEN SUBSTR(DIST.REV_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,1,3)='433' THEN 'Y'
 ELSE 'N'
 END SERVICE_FLG
 ,NROL.BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD  AS RU_BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
 ,NULL
 ,SLS.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER
 ,DIST.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD
 ,DIST.TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD

 ,COALESCE(DIST.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)
 ,COALESCE(DIST.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)
 ,COALESCE(DIST.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)
 ,DIST.REV_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
 ,DIST.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE
 ,DIST.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE
 ,DIST.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
 ,(CAST(( COALESCE(DIST.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT,0.000000) + COALESCE(DIST.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT,0.000000)) * SLS.SLS_COMM_PCT    AS DECIMAL(26,7)))  AS GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT
 ,(CAST((COALESCE(DIST.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_FUNC_CREDIT_AMT,0.000000) + COALESCE(DIST.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_FUNC_DEBIT_AMT,0.000000))  * SLS.SLS_COMM_PCT    AS DECIMAL(26,7)))  AS GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT

 ((CAST(COALESCE(DIST.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT ,0.000000) * SLS.SLS_COMM_PCT /* * GDCR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE */ AS DECIMAL(26,7)))  ) )   AS COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT
 ,( CAST( (COALESCE(DIST.INVOICE_LINE_USD_AMOUNT,0.000000)) * SLS.SLS_COMM_PCT * (CASE  WHEN DIST.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = 'USD'
 THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(GDCR1.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,0)
 END) AS DECIMAL(26,7)))  AS INVOICE_LINE_USD_AMOUNT
/* ,(CASE WHEN
 ( CASE WHEN NCAT.ERP_REVENUE_CUSTOMER_FLAG = 'I' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END  = 'Y'
 AND  (CASE WHEN ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER IS NULL OR NSTT.BK_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE = 'UNKNOWN'  OR NSTT.BK_SALES_HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE <> 'CORP. REVENUE' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END ) = 'Y'
 )
 THEN 'Y'
 ELSE 'N'
 END ) DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG */
 ,'Y' AS  DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG
 , DIST.UNEARN_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
 ,DIST.BK_DEAL_ID
 ,CASE WHEN MSI.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN MSI.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE MSI.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID
 ,DIST.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY
 ,NROL.ATTRIBUTION_CD DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
 , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
 , USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
 , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM
 , USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
 ,DIST.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD
 ,DIST.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 ,SLS.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
 ,DIST.DV_ADJ_REBATE_TRX_KEY
 ,DIST.POS_TRX_ID_INT

 FROM     $$STGDB.WI_GL_DIST_DEFERRED_CSPP_VIP DIST
/* INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE   NECAL   ON (NECAL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY = DIST.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY)	  

 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCAT   ON (NCAT.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NECAL.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY)
*/ 
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI   NROL
 ON NROL. ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY = DIST.DV_ADJ_REBATE_TRX_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_SLS_CRDT_DERIVATION_CSPP_VIP SLS
 ON SLS.DV_ADJ_REBATE_TRX_KEY = DIST.DV_ADJ_REBATE_TRX_KEY 
 --AND SLS.SOURCE_CODE = DIST.SOURCE_CODE
 
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
 ON NROL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY =NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY   


 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DEF_CURR_CONV_RATE_CSPP_VIP  GDCR
 ON GDCR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = DIST.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
 AND GDCR.FUNCNL_TRXNL_CODE = 'FUNCTIONAL'

/*
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_TV NSTT
 ON SLS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = NSTT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 AND NSTT.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
*/

 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
 ON SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=DIST.SS_CODE
/* INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE  ABT
 ON ABT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=DIST.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY  */
 INNER  JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS MSI
 ON MSI.ITEM_KEY=NROL.PRODUCT_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DEF_CURR_CONV_RATE_CSPP_VIP  GDCR1
 ON GDCR1.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = DIST.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE
 AND GDCR1.FUNCNL_TRXNL_CODE = 'TRANSACTIONAL'
 LEFT JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSORDTV
 ON SLS.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY
 AND NSORDTV.SS_CODE IN 'OPL'
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SOL_END_CUSTOMER_TV SOL_END_CUST
 ON SLS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = SOL_END_CUST.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 AND SOL_END_CUST.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
 AND SOL_END_CUST.SS_CODE  IN 'CG'

 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SO_END_CUSTOMER_TV SO_END_CUST
 ON SO_END_CUST.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORDTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY
 AND SO_END_CUST.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
 AND SO_END_CUST.SS_CD  IN 'CG' 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SOL /* INC9032116 Added */
    ON SLS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  = SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  

 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS ECGA
 ON (DIST.REV_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE = ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER )
 WHERE DIST.SOURCE_CODE IN ('VIP_XAAS_ADJ', 'CSPP_XAAS_ADJ','CPI_XAAS_ADJ')
 AND SLS.SS_CODE = 'CG'
 AND DIST.POS_TRX_ID_INT > 0
/* AND SLS.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT <0 */
and 1=1

 AND SLS.SS_CODE = 'CG'
 AND DIST.POS_TRX_ID_INT < 0
 AND SLS.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT >0
and 1=1
